title: Learning Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Learning Techniques inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.
featuredTermTitles: RLHF Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback

steps.title: Imitation Learning
steps.summary: A type of learning where an agent learns to mimic the behavior of another agent or expert. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Imitation Learning Agent and Multi-Agent Imitation Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Inverse Reinforcement Learning
steps.summary: The process of inferring the reward function from an expert's demonstrations. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Reinforcement Learning. It opens into Forward and Inverse Reinforcement Learning and AI in Inverse Reinforcement Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: RLHF Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback
steps.summary: RLHF Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Learning Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Reinforcement Learning. It opens into Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.
